mapper.sql: id, image_name, image_path, image_index, create_time, create_by, update_by, update_time, delete_flag
mapper.insert:
insert into index_image
id,
image_name,
image_path,
image_index,
create_time,
create_by,
update_by,
update_time,
delete_flag,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{imageName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{imagePath,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{imageIndex,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
mapper.update:
update index_image
image_name = #{imageName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
image_path = #{imagePath,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
image_index = #{imageIndex,jdbcType=INTEGER},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
delete_flag = #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update index_image set image_name = #{imageName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, image_path = #{imagePath,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, image_index = #{imageIndex,jdbcType=INTEGER}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, delete_flag = #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.insert:
insert into index_image (id, image_name, image_path, image_index, create_time, create_by, update_by, update_time, delete_flag) values
(#{item.id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{item.imageName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.imagePath,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.imageIndex,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER} )

insert into index_image (id, image_name, image_path, image_index, create_time, create_by, update_by, update_time, delete_flag) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{imageName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{imagePath,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{imageIndex,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER} ) on duplicate key update id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, image_name = #{imageName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, image_path = #{imagePath,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, image_index = #{imageIndex,jdbcType=INTEGER}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, delete_flag = #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER}

id,
image_name,
image_path,
image_index,
create_time,
create_by,
update_by,
update_time,
delete_flag,
values

on duplicate key update
id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
image_name = #{imageName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
image_path = #{imagePath,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
image_index = #{imageIndex,jdbcType=INTEGER},
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
create_by = #{createBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
delete_flag = #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=INTEGER},
mapper.select: select from index_image where 1=1 order by image_index
